placeHint: Click a shape and place it on the canvas.
ai.title: TikZ
ai.heading: Copilot
ai.prompt.createDiagram: Create a simple editable diagram from this scene.
ai.prompt.improveScene: Arrange and improve the current scene while keeping its main elements. Propose changes so I can review them before applying.
ai.prompt.fixTikz: Generate or fix equivalent TikZ code for this scene.
ai.prompt.addLabels: Add useful short labels to the main elements in the scene. Propose changes so I can review them before applying.
ai.prompt.explainScene: Explain the current scene clearly and briefly.
ai.prompt.simplifyScene: Simplify the current scene while keeping the main idea and reducing unnecessary elements.
ai.welcome: Describe what you want to create, fix, or explain. I will propose changes before applying them.
ai.placeholder: Describe what you want to do...
ai.simpleProposalReady: I prepared a proposal for the canvas.
ai.localGreetingInputs: hello|hi|hey|good morning|good afternoon|good evening|how are you
ai.commonGreetingInputs: hola|bon dia|bona tarda|bona nit|buenos dias|buenas tardes|buenas noches|que tal|com estas|como estas|hello|hi|hey|good morning|good afternoon|good evening
ai.localGreetingFallback: Hi! Tell me what you want to create, fix, or improve on the canvas.
ai.localThanksFallback: You’re welcome. Tell me what you want to create, fix, or improve on the canvas.
ai.localCapabilityFallback: Yes. You can add graphs: open shape search (Ctrl + F by default, or your configured shortcut) and search for "graph". You can also ask me for one and I will prepare an editable proposal.
ai.localShapeCapabilityFallback: Yes. You can add shapes from the library or ask me for one directly; I will prepare an editable proposal for you to review before applying it.
ai.localModelUnclearResponse: I could not prepare a reliable local response. Try describing the change with a specific shape or selection.
ai.localQuickActionReady: I prepared a quick proposal for the canvas.
ai.localEditNoMatchingShape: I could not find an editable square on the canvas. Select one or create it before changing its thickness.
ai.localEditNoMatchingTriangle: I could not find an editable triangle on the canvas. Select one or create it before changing its color.
ai.localEditNeedsSelection: To edit an existing shape, I need a selection or a clear reference to an element on the canvas.
ai.localStrokeWidthEditReady: I prepared the thickness change for the square.
ai.localColorEditReady: I prepared the color change for the triangle.
ai.localColorEditReadyGeneric: I prepared the color change for the selection.
ai.errorUnclearResponse: I could not prepare a clear response.
ai.errorGeneric: The response could not be generated.
ai.errorFirebaseTimeout: The response took too long. Try again in a few seconds.
ai.errorWebLlmTimeout: The response took too long. Try again in a few seconds.
ai.errorWebLlmUnsupported: Smart assistance is not available in this browser.
ai.errorLocalUnavailableNoFallback: Smart assistance is not available right now.
ai.errorBrowserLocalTimeout: The response took too long. Try again in a few seconds.
ai.errorBrowserLocalUnavailable: Smart assistance is not available on this device.
ai.errorRemoteUnavailableFallback: Smart assistance is not available right now.
ai.errorNoAiProviderAvailable: Smart assistance is not available right now. Try again later.
ai.errorWebLlmNotReady: Smart assistance is still getting ready. Try again in a few seconds.
ai.localUnavailableDescription: This browser does not expose WebGPU, so Firebase will be used.
ai.localEnabledDescription: WebLLM will be tried first and Firebase will act as fallback.
ai.cloudEnabledDescription: Firebase is the active mode. Local AI downloads only when you install it.
ai.allowRemoteFallback: Allow remote fallback if local AI fails
ai.temperatureTooltip: Controls response variation. Lower is more stable; higher is more creative.
ai.maxTokensTooltip: Maximum number of tokens the model can generate in one response.
ai.webLlmTimeoutTooltip: Maximum time to wait for WebLLM before treating it as failed.
ai.automaticWebLlmTimeoutTooltip: Maximum WebLLM wait when automatic local mode can try other providers.
ai.allowRemoteFallbackTooltip: If local AI fails or returns an unusable response, allow trying the remote model.
ai.debugLogsTooltip: Shows detailed AI logs in the console. Only applies in dev mode.
ai.pendingChangesDescription: There are AI-generated figures you have not applied yet. Choose what to do before creating another one.
ai.settingsDescription: These values control the AI provider, models, limits, and timeouts; canvas changes still go through preview and manual apply.
ai.privacyNotice: Your instructions and a simplified version of the scene may be processed to prepare the response. Images and full code are not sent unless you request it.
applicationConfigurationDescription: Adjust editor, scene and LaTeX defaults from one place.
sceneSettingsPreviewDescription: These values affect how new elements are created and how the canvas behaves.
resetDefaultsConfirmDescription: This restores the editor, scene and LaTeX configuration to the default values.
import.source.tikz.label: TikZ code
import.source.tikz.note: Paste TikZ code or load a .tikz file. Supported shapes become editable and unsupported lines are preserved as raw TikZ.
import.source.tikz.tooltip: Paste TikZ directly or import a standalone .tikz file.
import.source.tex.label: LaTeX .tex
import.source.tex.note: Upload a LaTeX document and choose one or more tikzpicture environments to import.
import.source.tex.tooltip: Import diagrams embedded in a LaTeX document.
import.source.projectJson.label: Project JSON
import.source.projectJson.note: Load a native Tikz Drawer project file with version validation for future migrations.
import.source.projectJson.tooltip: Restore a Tikz Drawer project from JSON.
import.source.drawio.label: Draw.io / XML
import.source.drawio.note: Import basic Draw.io rectangles, ellipses, text, connectors, arrows and colors.
import.source.drawio.tooltip: Import diagrams exported from Draw.io or diagrams.net.
import.source.svg.label: SVG
import.source.svg.note: Import basic SVG elements: lines, rectangles, circles, ellipses, simple paths and text.
import.source.svg.tooltip: Convert simple SVG vector elements into editable shapes.
import.source.mermaid.label: Mermaid
import.source.mermaid.note: Paste Mermaid graph code or load a .mmd file to generate editable nodes and edges.
import.source.mermaid.tooltip: Create an editable graph from Mermaid text.
import.source.dot.label: Graphviz DOT
import.source.dot.note: Upload a DOT graph and generate editable graph nodes and edges.
import.source.dot.tooltip: Create an editable graph from a Graphviz DOT file.
import.source.csv.label: CSV coordinates
import.source.csv.note: Import points or polylines from tabular data and configure x, y, label and group columns.
import.source.csv.tooltip: Build editable points and paths from coordinate data.
import.source.image.label: Image
import.source.image.note: Import a PNG or JPG onto the canvas.
import.source.image.tooltip: Insert an image onto the canvas.
import.filePlaceholderPaste: Choose a file or paste code below
import.filePlaceholderImage: Choose a PNG or JPG image
import.fileDropTooltip: Select a compatible file for the active import source.
import.input.tikz.title: TikZ code
import.input.tikz.description: Paste TikZ code or load a .tikz file. Supported shapes become editable and unsupported lines are preserved as raw TikZ.
import.input.tex.title: LaTeX document
import.input.tex.description: Load a .tex file and select the tikzpicture environments you want to import.
import.input.projectJson.title: Tikz Drawer project
import.input.projectJson.description: Load a native project with version validation to restore it as an editable scene.
import.input.drawio.title: Draw.io diagram
import.input.drawio.description: Load a .drawio or .xml file to convert basic shapes, text and connectors.
import.input.svg.title: SVG vector
import.input.svg.description: Load an SVG and convert lines, rectangles, circles, ellipses, simple paths and text.
import.input.mermaid.title: Mermaid
import.input.mermaid.description: Paste Mermaid code or load a .mmd file to generate editable nodes and connections.
import.input.dot.title: Graphviz DOT
import.input.dot.description: Load a DOT file to build an editable graph from its nodes and edges.
import.input.csv.title: CSV coordinates
import.input.csv.description: Load a coordinate table and adjust the columns that define x, y, label and group.
import.input.image.title: Image
import.input.image.description: Load a PNG or JPG and insert it onto the canvas.
import.diagramPickerLabel: TikZ diagrams found in the document
import.emptyStateDescription: Choose a compatible file for this source to preview it before importing.
import.errorSummary: Fix the issue below and try importing again.
import.errorFileRead: The selected file could not be read.
import.errorImportFailed: The selected source could not be imported.
import.warningSummary: Import can continue. Editable shapes were created where possible and the rest is preserved so no information is lost.
import.warningRawTikzSingular: {count} unsupported line was preserved as raw TikZ
import.warningRawTikzPlural: {count} unsupported lines were preserved as raw TikZ
import.warningRawTikzLineSummary: Unsupported line preserved as raw TikZ.
import.warningCsvRowSummary: CSV row skipped because its coordinates are invalid.
import.warningSvgPathSummary: Unsupported SVG path preserved as technical detail.
import.warningNoTikzPictures: No tikzpicture environments were found in the LaTeX document.
import.warningCsvNeedsRows: The CSV needs a header row and at least one data row.
import.warningImageReference: The image will be inserted onto the canvas.
import.clearSceneBeforeImportHelper: When enabled, the current content is replaced by the imported file.
importReplaceDialogDescription: The import will load as the new canvas content.
importReplaceDialogWarningTitle: You will lose the current drawing if you continue.
importReplaceDialogWarningDescription: Download a JSON copy before replacing it if you want to recover it later.
import.readyEditableSummary: The selected source will become editable elements where possible.
import.readyReferenceSummary: The image will be added to the canvas.
import.importTooltip: Import the selected source into the current canvas.
keyboardShortcutsDescription: View and change the editor's main shortcuts.
shortcutCaptureInstruction: Press the new shortcut. Esc cancels.
shortcutConflictDescription: Remove it from the previous action and use it here, or keep it and press another shortcut.
resetShortcutsConfirmDescription: All shortcuts will return to their defaults.
name: Name
saveTemplateDescription: Save the current selection so it appears in the figure catalog.
replaceTemplateWithSelection: Replace the contents with the current selection
deleteTemplateDescription: This template will be removed from the local catalog.
noSavedTemplates: There are no saved templates yet.
exportDescription: Copy the generated code, download it or share the exact same figure.
exportScopeSelection: Downloads will export only the current selection.
exportScopeScene: Downloads will export the entire scene.
exportNoticeSelectionPng: Exported the current selection as PNG.
exportNoticeScenePng: Exported the entire scene as PNG.
exportNoticeSelectionSvg: Exported the current selection as SVG.
exportNoticeSceneSvg: Exported the entire scene as SVG.
latexSettingsDescription: Adjust how the snippet and standalone file are generated.
latexWrapFigure: Wrap TikZ inside a figure environment
latexScaleToWidth: Fit automatically to the available width
latexScopeGuard: When no figure environment is used, the snippet is wrapped in braces so \centering, text sizing, and similar commands do not leak into the rest of the document.
latexColorModeDescription: Choose how colors are encoded in the exported code.
latexColorDirectDescription: Uses RGB values directly in the figure, without extra definitions.
latexColorDefinedDescription: Declares colors with \definecolor and then reuses color names.
shareLinkReady: Link copied. Share it to open the full figure.
shareLinkImagesWarning: The link was copied, but images will not be included when sharing it.
confirmReplaceScene: This will replace the current scene. Do you want to continue?
confirmReplaceSceneDescription: This action will replace the current scene.
startDrawingHint: Pick a shape and place it on the canvas.
tableRecognizedHint: This selection is treated as a table, so rows and columns can be updated without rebuilding it by hand.
tableDialogCreateDescription: Choose the number of columns and rows before placing the table on the canvas.
tableDialogEditDescription: Update the table structure while keeping the same outer size and visual style.
regularPolygonDialogDescription: Choose the number of sides before placing the figure on the canvas.
graphDialogDescription: Adjust vertices, edges and options before placing the graph on the canvas.
